b:tag.cond: data:i == 3 and (data:font not in [data:fonts[0], data:fonts[1], data:fonts[2]])
b:tag.name: link

b:if.p: Please Select Embedded Mode To show the Comment System.*

b:if.cond: data:view.isPost and (data:post.body not contains "(hideAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")
data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "(showAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")
data:view.isPost and (data:post.body not contains "(hideAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")
data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "(showAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")

b:if.script: /**/ function get_text(e){ret="";for(var t=e.childNodes.length,n=0;n<t;n++){var o=e.childNodes[n];8!=o.nodeType&&(ret+=1!=o.nodeType?o.nodeValue:get_text(o))}return ret}var words=get_text(document.getElementById("postBody")),count=words.split(" ").length,avg=200,counted=count/avg,maincount=Math.round(counted);document.getElementById("readTime").innerHTML=maincount+" minute read"; /**/

b:includable.b:tag: var disqus_blogger_current_url = ""; if (!disqus_blogger_current_url.length) { disqus_blogger_current_url = ""; } var disqus_blogger_homepage_url = ""; var disqus_blogger_canonical_homepage_url = "";

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: Your Responsive Ads code (Google Ads)

b:if.p: Please Select Embedded Mode To show the Comment System.*

b:if.cond: data:view.isPost and (data:post.body not contains "(hideAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")
data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "(showAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")
data:view.isPost and (data:post.body not contains "(hideAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")
data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "(showAds)" and data:post.body not contains "(nextPage)")

b:if.script: /**/ function get_text(e){ret="";for(var t=e.childNodes.length,n=0;n<t;n++){var o=e.childNodes[n];8!=o.nodeType&&(ret+=1!=o.nodeType?o.nodeValue:get_text(o))}return ret}var words=get_text(document.getElementById("postBody")),count=words.split(" ").length,avg=200,counted=count/avg,maincount=Math.round(counted);document.getElementById("readTime").innerHTML=maincount+" minute read"; /**/

b:includable.b:tag: var disqus_blogger_current_url = ""; if (!disqus_blogger_current_url.length) { disqus_blogger_current_url = ""; } var disqus_blogger_homepage_url = ""; var disqus_blogger_canonical_homepage_url = "";

b:if.cond: data:view.isPost or data:view.isLayoutMode or data:view.isPage or data:view.isError

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: Movie Hut Template is Designed Theme for Giving Enhanced look Various Features are available Which is designed in User friendly to handle by Edgy Developers. Simple and elegant themes for making it more comfortable

div.span: Developed by ❤️ - Blogger Templates at Edgy Templates

b:if.b:tag: var postPerPage = "6"; var numOfPages= 2; var pageOf= ["Page", "of"];
